languages.text: {n}На мгновение Вигдис замолкает, прислушиваясь к параллельной передаче, а затем вновь рапортует:{/n} "В процессии замечены оба специалиста Сектора Бионика. Похоже, хирургеоны сумели вернуть к жизни того, кто считался погибшим".

traits.locale_text: {n}На мгновение Вигдис замолкает, прислушиваясь к параллельной передаче, а затем вновь рапортует:{/n} "В процессии замечены оба специалиста Сектора Бионика. Похоже, хирургеоны сумели вернуть к жизни того, кто считался погибшим".

languages.text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."
languages.original_text: {n}На мгновение Вигдис замолкает, прислушиваясь к параллельной передаче, а затем вновь рапортует:{/n} "В процессии замечены оба специалиста Сектора Бионика. Похоже, хирургеоны сумели вернуть к жизни того, кто считался погибшим".

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to the parallel transmission, and then reports again:{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in reviving the one deemed to be dead."

{n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to the parallel transmission, and then reports again:{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in reviving the one deemed to be dead."

{n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to the parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in reviving the one deemed to be dead."

{n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to the parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in reviving the one deemed to be dead."

{n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."

languages.text: {n}Vigdis hält kurz inne, hört sich die parallele Übertragung an und erklärt:{/n} "Beide Spezialisten aus dem Sektor Bionica wurden bei der Prozession gesehen. Wie es scheint, haben die Chirurgeums Euren Diener von der Schwelle des Todes zurückgeholt."
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis hält kurz inne, hört sich die parallele Übertragung an und erklärt:{/n} "Beide Spezialisten aus dem Sektor Bionica wurden bei der Prozession gesehen. Wie es scheint, haben die Chirurgeums Euren Diener von der Schwelle des Todes zurückgeholt."

languages.text: {n}Vigdis s'interrompt un instant pour écouter une transmission parallèle, puis vous fait son rapport :{/n} « Les deux spécialistes du secteur Bionica ont été repérés dans la procession. Il semblerait que les chirurgeons aient réussi à sauver votre serviteur in extrémis. »
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis s'interrompt un instant pour écouter une transmission parallèle, puis vous fait son rapport :{/n} « Les deux spécialistes du secteur Bionica ont été repérés dans la procession. Il semblerait que les chirurgeons aient réussi à sauver votre serviteur in extrémis. »

languages.text: {n}维格迪斯顿了片刻，听着另一路传来的消息，然后继续汇报，{/n}“仿生区的两名专家均出现在游行队伍中。看来那些船医成功救活了您那位濒死的仆从。”
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."

traits.locale_text: {n}维格迪斯顿了片刻，听着另一路传来的消息，然后继续汇报，{/n}“仿生区的两名专家均出现在游行队伍中。看来那些船医成功救活了您那位濒死的仆从。”

languages.text: {n}Vigdis se detiene por un momento, escuchando una transmisión paralela, y vuelve a informarte:{/n} «Ambos especialistas del Sector Bionica han sido avistados entre los integrantes de la procesión. Parece que los cirujanos lograron salvar a su sirviente al borde de la muerte».
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis se detiene por un momento, escuchando una transmisión paralela, y vuelve a informarte:{/n} «Ambos especialistas del Sector Bionica han sido avistados entre los integrantes de la procesión. Parece que los cirujanos lograron salvar a su sirviente al borde de la muerte».

languages.text: {n}ヴィグディスはしばし口をつぐみ、並行する通信に耳を傾けると、こう報告する。{/n}「セクター・ビオニカの専門家が二人とも、行列の中に確認されました。外科医たちは、あなたのしもべを死の淵から連れ戻すことに成功したようです。」
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."

traits.locale_text: {n}ヴィグディスはしばし口をつぐみ、並行する通信に耳を傾けると、こう報告する。{/n}「セクター・ビオニカの専門家が二人とも、行列の中に確認されました。外科医たちは、あなたのしもべを死の淵から連れ戻すことに成功したようです。」

languages.text: {n}Vigdis, paralel bir yayını dinleyerek bir an duraklıyor ve ardından rapor veriyor.{/n} "Sektör Biyonika'dan her iki uzmanın da alayda görüldüğü bildirildi. Görünüşe göre cerrahlar, ölmek üzere olan hizmetkârı kurtarmayı başarmışlar."
languages.original_text: {n}Vigdis pauses for a moment, listening to a parallel transmission, and then reports back,{/n} "Both specialists from the Sector Bionica have been sighted in the procession. It appears the chirurgeons have succeeded in bringing your servant back from the brink of death."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vigdis, paralel bir yayını dinleyerek bir an duraklıyor ve ardından rapor veriyor.{/n} "Sektör Biyonika'dan her iki uzmanın da alayda görüldüğü bildirildi. Görünüşe göre cerrahlar, ölmek üzere olan hizmetkârı kurtarmayı başarmışlar."
